game_view.placeholder_start: Enter an opening line to start your adventure...
game_view.input_hint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

ai_config.title: 🤖 AI Configuration
ai_config.guide_title: 📋 How to get an API Key?
ai_config.guide_step_1: Go to the AI platform of your choice to register, common platforms:
ai_config.guide_step_1_sub_1: Other OpenAI-compatible providers are also supported.
ai_config.guide_step_2: Create a new key on the platform's API Keys page and paste it below.
ai_config.guide_step_3: Set the Base URL to the corresponding platform's API address.
ai_config.guide_step_4: Enter the Model name you want to use (e.g., gpt-4o, deepseek-chat).
ai_config.api_key_hint: Your API key. Keep it safe and do not share it.
ai_config.base_url_hint:
Common Base URLs:
• OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1
• DeepSeek: https://api.deepseek.com
• Custom / Local: Enter your own address
ai_config.model_hint: Enter the full model name, e.g., gpt-4o, deepseek-chat. Must match the provider of your API Key and Base URL.

about.desc: AIgal is a modern Galgame driven by Large Language Models (LLMs). Players interact with AI using natural language, and AI generates the plot, dialogue, scenes, and character performances in real-time, creating an infinitely branching immersive narrative experience.
about.feature_1_desc: Real-time generation of infinite plot branches
about.feature_4_desc: Travel back to any previous plot node
about.feature_6_desc: View/modify AI communication data in real-time
about.footer: AIgal — Let AI be your storyteller ✨

save_load.confirm_load: Are you sure you want to load save '{{name}}'? Current progress will be lost.
save_load.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this save?

timeline.confirm_rollback: Are you sure you want to rollback to event {{timeId}}? All progress after this will be lost!

debug_panel.hint_current: You can modify the raw JSON response of the current turn here. Click save to instantly sync the game UI.
debug_panel.no_llm_data: (No debug data, might be an early session)

variables.desc: The following variables are auto-generated and updated by AI, and can also be edited manually. They are sent to the AI in every conversation.
variables.empty: No variables (AI will create them automatically after the game starts)

prompt_editor.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt? If it's the default prompt, the game might not run!
prompt_editor.title: Prompt Files
prompt_editor.empty_selection: Select or create a prompt file
prompt_editor.default_content_template:
# System Prompt

Write your system prompt here...

world_book.confirm_delete_book: Are you sure you want to delete this world book?
world_book.empty_books: No world books yet. Click '+' to create one or import an existing one.
world_book.always_hint_on: Injected into every AI request automatically, no keywords needed.
world_book.always_hint_off: Triggered only when keywords are matched.

asset_manager.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete {{filename}}?
asset_manager.empty_hint: Click upload button or drag files here
